privacy.notes: Synthetic metadata-only contract. Local-only official fixtures stay user-supplied and are not published outside the licensed environment.

commands.name: list_emergency_classification_fixture_manifests
commands.notes: List synthetic emergency classification fixture manifests without embedding proprietary classifier payloads.

commands.name: validate_emergency_classification_compatibility
commands.notes: Check UDG or AECC family alignment, declared transition windows, and compatibility with the requested pricing year.

commands.name: summarize_downstream_emergency_nwau_behavior
commands.notes: Describe the downstream emergency NWAU effect that follows from the declared classification result without exposing licensed payloads.

commands.name: resolve_local_official_fixture_reference
commands.notes: Record a local-only official fixture placeholder for a licensed environment without bundling restricted content.

commands.name: describe_no_proprietary_payload_boundary
commands.notes: Declare that proprietary mapping tables, raw official reference payloads, and production extracts remain excluded from committed fixtures.

fixture_manifest_schema.description: Versioned manifest shape for emergency classification parity fixtures. Each manifest is metadata only and declares the fixture type, classifier family, mapping version, pricing year, stream, raw source fields, expected class result, downstream NWAU behavior, and provenance.

field_definitions.name: fixture_id
field_definitions.purpose: Stable identifier for the parity fixture.

field_definitions.name: fixture_version
field_definitions.purpose: Fixture release version used for deterministic diffing.

field_definitions.name: fixture_type
field_definitions.purpose: Declared fixture class, either synthetic or local_official.

field_definitions.name: classifier_family
field_definitions.purpose: Declared emergency classification family, such as UDG or AECC.

field_definitions.name: classifier_version
field_definitions.purpose: Classifier version bound to the fixture.

field_definitions.name: mapping_table_version
field_definitions.purpose: Mapping-table version bound to the fixture.

field_definitions.name: pricing_year
field_definitions.purpose: Pricing year that determines the authoritative emergency classification behavior.

field_definitions.name: stream
field_definitions.purpose: Declared emergency stream or episode scope under test.

field_definitions.name: raw_source_fields
field_definitions.purpose: Synthetic source fields that drive classification without embedding proprietary tables.

field_definitions.name: expected_class_result
field_definitions.purpose: Expected emergency classification result or comparison outcome.

field_definitions.name: expected_nwau_outputs
field_definitions.purpose: Expected downstream emergency NWAU-facing behavior for the declared pricing year.

field_definitions.name: validation_status
field_definitions.purpose: Declared validation state such as pass, fail, or unknown.

field_definitions.name: provenance
field_definitions.purpose: Metadata for source manifest paths, source URLs, retrieval date, local-only reference location, and checksums.

compatibility_diagnostics_schema.description: Versioned diagnostics shape for compatibility checks across UDG and AECC fixtures. Reports family-year alignment, transition-year authority, downstream NWAU behavior, and boundary checks.

field_definitions.name: diagnostic_id
field_definitions.purpose: Stable identifier for the diagnostics report.

field_definitions.name: compatibility_state
field_definitions.purpose: Declared compatibility state such as pass, fail, or unknown.

field_definitions.name: checks
field_definitions.purpose: Structured compatibility checks with outcomes and explanatory notes.

downstream_nwau_behavior_summary_schema.description: Versioned summary shape for downstream emergency NWAU behavior. Captures how the declared class result affects the pricing-year pathway without exposing restricted payloads.

field_definitions.name: summary_id
field_definitions.purpose: Stable identifier for the downstream NWAU behavior summary.

field_definitions.name: behavior_summary
field_definitions.purpose: Structured behavior statements describing the expected pricing-year effect.

fixture_surface_types.label: Synthetic fixture manifest
fixture_surface_types.purpose: Metadata-only declaration of a parity fixture, including family, pricing year, source fields, expected classification, and downstream NWAU behavior.

fixture_surface_types.label: Local-only official fixture placeholder
fixture_surface_types.purpose: Local placeholder for a user-supplied official reference fixture that must remain inside the licensed environment.

fixture_surface_types.label: Compatibility diagnostics record
fixture_surface_types.purpose: Synthetic validation and boundary diagnostics for family-year alignment, transition-year authority, and local-only handling.

fixture_surface_types.label: Downstream NWAU behavior summary
fixture_surface_types.purpose: Synthetic summary of the emergency NWAU-facing effect that follows from the declared classification outcome.

fixture_surface_types.label: No proprietary payload boundary record
fixture_surface_types.purpose: Explicit boundary declaration for fixtures that must not contain proprietary mapping payloads, licensed tables, or restricted outputs.

compatibility_rules.label: Metadata-only fixtures
compatibility_rules.description: Reject fixtures that embed proprietary classifier payloads, licensed tables, or production extracts.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared fixture type
compatibility_rules.description: Require each fixture to declare whether it is synthetic or local_official.

compatibility_rules.label: Family and version alignment
compatibility_rules.description: Require each fixture to declare a classifier family, classifier version, and mapping-table version that agree with the selected pricing year.

compatibility_rules.label: Pricing-year alignment
compatibility_rules.description: Reject fixtures that mix UDG and AECC families across incompatible pricing-year windows unless a transition rule is explicitly declared.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared transition authority
compatibility_rules.description: Require transition-year fixtures to declare which classifier family is authoritative for the comparison being run.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared downstream NWAU behavior
compatibility_rules.description: Require each manifest to state the downstream emergency NWAU effect that corresponds to the expected class result.

compatibility_rules.label: Local-only official reference
compatibility_rules.description: Record official fixtures only as local placeholders or metadata-only descriptors and do not commit the restricted payload itself.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared payload boundary
compatibility_rules.description: Require every fixture bundle to declare that proprietary payloads, licensed tables, and restricted outputs are absent.

compatibility_rules.label: No implicit UDG/AECC crosswalk
compatibility_rules.description: Do not infer UDG or AECC behavior unless the fixture explicitly declares the family, version, and transition authority.

examples.name: synthetic-fixture-manifest
examples.description: Synthetic parity fixture manifest with raw source fields, expected class result, downstream NWAU behavior, and provenance.

examples.name: local-official-fixture-placeholder
examples.description: Local-only official fixture placeholder for a licensed environment that must not be redistributed.

examples.name: compatibility-diagnostics
examples.description: Synthetic diagnostics report covering family-year alignment, transition authority, downstream NWAU, and boundary checks.

examples.name: downstream-emergency-nwau-behavior-summary
examples.description: Synthetic summary of the emergency NWAU effect that follows from the declared classification result.

examples.name: no-proprietary-payload-boundary
examples.description: Synthetic boundary declaration that excludes proprietary payloads, licensed tables, and restricted outputs.
